questions: How do I invest in real estate?
jomi ba flat kena ki bhalo investment?
What are the types of real estate?
answers: Real estate refers to land, buildings, and property. It includes residential homes, commercial buildings, industrial properties, and undeveloped land.
Real estate holo jomi, building, ar property — bari, flat, commercial building, industrial jaygay, ar khaali jomi sob e real estate.
You can invest in real estate by buying property to rent or sell, investing in Real Estate Investment Trusts (REITs), or flipping houses for profit.

Real estate is often considered a solid investment because property values generally appreciate over time, and rental income provides steady cash flow. However, it requires significant capital upfront.
